axis_condition_extremum_label: Which {answer_axis} label has the most cells with {condition_phrase}?
Find the {answer_axis} with the largest number of cells with {condition_phrase}. What is its label?
Across all {answer_axis}s, which one contains the most cells with {condition_phrase}?
Using the heatmap colors, which {answer_axis} label has the most cells with {condition_phrase}?
What {answer_axis} label corresponds to the greatest count of cells with {condition_phrase}?
axis_cell_extremum_label: In {query_axis} "{axis_label}", which {answer_axis} label has the {extremum_phrase} cell?
Look only at {query_axis} "{axis_label}". What {answer_axis} label contains the {extremum_phrase} cell?
For {query_axis} "{axis_label}", what {answer_axis} label has the {extremum_phrase} cell?
What {answer_axis} label has the {extremum_phrase} cell in {query_axis} "{axis_label}"?
condition_run_extremum_label: Which row label has the longest consecutive run of cells with {condition_phrase}?
Find the row with the longest left-to-right run of cells with {condition_phrase}. What is its label?
Across all rows, which row contains the longest uninterrupted sequence of cells with {condition_phrase}?
Using the heatmap order from left to right, which row label has the longest run of cells with {condition_phrase}?
What row label corresponds to the longest consecutive streak of cells with {condition_phrase}?
colorbar_above_threshold_cell_count: Using the colorbar scale, how many cells have values above {threshold_value}?
How many heatmap cells are above {threshold_value} according to the colorbar scale?
Count the cells whose color corresponds to a value greater than {threshold_value} on the colorbar.
Using the numeric colorbar, what is the number of cells with values above {threshold_value}?
How many cells fall above {threshold_value} on the displayed color scale?
colorbar_below_threshold_cell_count: Using the colorbar scale, how many cells have values below {threshold_value}?
How many heatmap cells are below {threshold_value} according to the colorbar scale?
Count the cells whose color corresponds to a value less than {threshold_value} on the colorbar.
Using the numeric colorbar, what is the number of cells with values below {threshold_value}?
How many cells fall below {threshold_value} on the displayed color scale?
colorbar_interval_cell_count: Using the colorbar scale, how many cells have values from {lower_bound} to {upper_bound}, inclusive?
How many heatmap cells fall between {lower_bound} and {upper_bound}, inclusive, according to the colorbar?
Count the cells whose color corresponds to a value in the inclusive interval {lower_bound} to {upper_bound}.
Using the numeric colorbar, what is the number of cells with values from {lower_bound} through {upper_bound}?
How many cells fall within the inclusive colorbar range {lower_bound} to {upper_bound}?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

{json_example}

query:axis_condition_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row or column label as a string
query:axis_condition_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each matching cell in the winning row or column

query:axis_cell_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row or column label as a string
query:axis_cell_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the selected target cell

query:condition_run_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row label as a string
query:condition_run_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the winning consecutive run cells, from left to right

query:colorbar_above_threshold_cell_coun.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cell count as an integer
query:colorbar_above_threshold_cell_coun.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around all counted cells, in row-major order

query:colorbar_below_threshold_cell_coun.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cell count as an integer
query:colorbar_below_threshold_cell_coun.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around all counted cells, in row-major order

query:colorbar_interval_cell_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cell count as an integer
query:colorbar_interval_cell_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around all counted cells, in row-major order
